## What this changes

<!-- One or two lines. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `just lint` is clean and `qs -p quickshell/ii` parses without errors
- [ ] No personal data in the diff (hostnames, IPs, tokens, entity IDs)
- [ ] If it's a new feature: enable flag + gating + a **Settings → Custom** entry
- [ ] New system tools added to `setup/dependencies.txt`
- [ ] Verified live (a screenshot or the `qs ipc ... status` output helps)
